title: Page Spec Workflow Sample
summary: A small generated concept page that demonstrates the page-spec bundle workflow end to end.

whatItIs.title: What It Is
whatItIs.body: A reviewable concept page bundle produced by the page-spec generator instead of hand-written MDX boilerplate.

whyItMatters.title: Why It Matters
whyItMatters.body: Maintainers can validate one input shape and trust matching page, message, asset, and registry files.

simpleExample.title: Simple Example
simpleExample.body: Run `bun run generate:page-bundle --spec page-specs/page-spec-workflow-sample.json --dry-run` to preview paths before writing files.

whereItAppears.title: Where It Appears
whereItAppears.body: The sample lives under docs/concepts and loads through the same routing and loaders as hand-authored concept pages.

commonConfusions.title: Common Confusions
commonConfusions.body: Generated MDX should reference message keys; reader-facing prose belongs in messages/en.json.
